meaning: 诺思阿勒尔顿[英国英格兰北部城镇](北约克郡首府)
examples: She also proposes the sale of the force's headquarters building at Newby Wiske, near Northallerton.
The NHS is planning to reduce services at the Friarage in Northallerton, claiming they are unsustainable.
He returned to England and began work at the Friarage Hospital in Northallerton, North Yorkshire.
